definition: Short for "opposition" or "opponent". Refers to a rival gang member, enemy, or anyone from a conflicting set or block.
example: Don't trust him, he's an opp.

definition: To go to an enemy's territory with the intent to commit a violent act, typically a shooting. Also used more casually to mean arriving somewhere with energy.
example: We slid through on they block.

definition: To honor the deceased member, Mdot 59 made a song using this slang.
